pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 requirements if strict compliance is needed, though it may still run on J21; however, in the context of a 'J17 -> J21' migration stage, this is the primary configuration change required to target the new JDK.

services/mock/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
services/mock/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 language features, potentially missing out on Java 21 features or causing compatibility issues if the runtime is strictly Java 21.

services/site/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
services/site/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meeting the target JDK requirement.
